description_long: This convertible car features a distinctive open-top design with a perforated, mesh-like exterior shell in blue and red, giving it a unique, almost organic appearance. The body is compact and sits on four prominent wheels with visible metallic spokes. The interior is exposed, showing a steering wheel, dashboard, and two seats, all rendered in a metallic gray finish. The windshield is upright and transparent, while the rear includes a mounted spare tire. The car's overall form is reminiscent of classic off-road convertibles, with a rugged yet artistic aesthetic. The combination of metallic and colored mesh materials makes it stand out as both functional and decorative.
description: A compact, open-top convertible car with a blue and red perforated mesh exterior, metallic interior, and visible spare tire at the rear. The design blends classic off-road styling with artistic, modern elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and red mesh body, metallic wheels, and upright windshield.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire, open interior, and steering wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the mesh pattern and metallic interior details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the windshield, dashboard, and the intricate mesh covering the hood.
